title: A BUG: the result of execution on TIDB is completely different from the result of execution on MySQL, MariaDB
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, c2 INT DEFAULT 0, c3 DATE);
INSERT INTO t2(c1, c2) VALUES ('test', NULL), (NULL, 5), ('example', 10);
UPDATE t2 SET c2 = IF(c1 IS NOT NULL, c2 + 1, c2);
SELECT c1, COUNT(*) FROM t2 GROUP BY c1 HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent results from TiDB compared to MySQL and MariaDB
